Skip to contents
rmorielite 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Data retrieval (rmorielite’s own functions)

The polite, cache-aware retrieval layer provided by rmorielite itself.

rmorielite_fetch()
Polite, cache-aware HTTPS fetch
rmorielite_ckan_resolve()
Resolve a CKAN resource by name pattern
rmorielite_cache_dir()
Resolve the package cache directory

Re-exported domain & analysis API (from rmorie)

The full carceral, policing, and oversight API – correctional tracking and segregation (OTIS), special-investigations and oversight bodies (SIU, ARSAU), municipal police services (Toronto/TPS, Chicago/CPD, New York, Vancouver), and public-health / substance-use surveys (Canadian Cannabis Survey, CPADS, Health Infobase, CIHI) – plus the analysis toolkit (causal estimators, survey weighting, fairness audits, spatial statistics, item-response models) is re-exported from the upstream ‘rmorie’ package. Each re-exported function below links to its full reference in the rmorie manual (https://rootcoder007.github.io/rmorie/).

reexports irtsp morie_arsau_analyze_aggregate_summary morie_arsau_analyze_detailed_dataset morie_arsau_analyze_individual_records morie_arsau_analyze_main_records morie_arsau_analyze_probe_cycle_records morie_arsau_analyze_weapon_records morie_arsau_available_datasets morie_arsau_available_years morie_arsau_ckan_url morie_arsau_describe morie_arsau_download morie_arsau_fetch_sidecar morie_arsau_load_aggregate_summary morie_arsau_load_detailed_dataset morie_arsau_load_individual_records morie_arsau_load_main_records morie_arsau_load_probe_cycle_records
